original_text: R&D investment intensity remains elevated at 9.43% of revenue in Q3 2025, with R&D expenses of $8,866,000,000 against revenue of $94,036,000,000. This represents an increase from Q2 2025 R&D spending of $8,550,000,000, suggesting continued commitment to innovation despite revenue headwinds. The high R&D intensity reflects Apple's strategic focus on developing new product categories and AI capabilities, which will be critical for future growth drivers beyond the iPhone franchise.
revised_text: R&D investment intensity remains elevated at 9.43% of revenue in Q3 2025, with R&D expenses of $8,866,000,000 against revenue of $94,036,000,000. This represents an increase from Q2 2025 R&D spending of $8,550,000,000, suggesting continued commitment to innovation despite revenue headwinds.
changes_summary: Removed the unsupported claim regarding Apple's strategic focus on new product categories and AI capabilities as no evidence chunks contained management commentary or strategic announcements. Added C009 to support the Q2 revenue comparison underlying the 'revenue headwinds' statement. Retained financial metrics supported by income statement chunks and calculation K007.
